title: Opinion: Opinion | Why Netanyahu Is Both The Happiest And The Most Anxious Man Right Now
summary_full: Without US support, it is hard for Israel to fight any war. Netanyahu knows that. Can he revive his fortunes as his own countrymen and Trump get weary of his adventures?
